note: Prototype pollution in earlier versions (CVE-2020-8203 and related).
Prototype pollution via crafted argument parsing (CVE-2021-44906).
Exposure of sensitive headers on redirect (CVE-2022-0235 and related).
Open redirect / qs-related issues patched in later 4.x releases.
SSRF via crafted redirect handling (CVE-2021-3749 and related).
